title: BlurFilter
description: Box-blur Filter implemented as multiple additive sprite passes. The blur is approximated by rendering the input texture `quality * 2 + 1` times offset symmetrically along each axis by up to ±`radius` pixels and blending them additively. Higher `quality` values add more samples and produce a smoother result at the cost of additional draw calls.

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: Box-blur Filter implemented as multiple additive sprite passes.

The blur is approximated by rendering the input texture `quality * 2 + 1` times offset symmetrically along each axis by up to ±`radius` pixels and blending them additively. Higher `quality` values add more samples and produce a smoother result at the cost of additional draw calls.

members.name: apply
members.signature: apply(backend: RenderBackend, input: RenderTexture, output: RenderTexture): void
members.description: Execute one filter pass: sample from input, write the result to output. Both textures are the same dimensions as the filtered drawable's bounding box.

members.name: destroy
members.description: Release any GPU-side resources held by this filter (uniform buffers, pipelines, intermediate textures). Default is a no-op for stateless filters; subclasses with state (BlurFilter, ColorFilter) override.
